paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05, with a 2.02% increase from the prior close and a 36.32% decrease over a 20-session window.

The recent news is driven by the company's governance concerns, including the resignation of director designee Miles Everson, who cited disagreements over access to company books and records. Additionally, the company completed a $375 million offering of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, which has raised questions about the company's valuation and governance practices.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K filing on July 15, 2026, which disclosed the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Another 8-K filing on July 13, 2026, disclosed the resignation of director Miles Everson, effective July 10, 2026. There has been one Form 4 filing in the feed.
